concept_hook: A cybernetically-enhanced prodigy who fights with deadly precision while broadcasting her fights as immersive entertainment for millions of obsessed fans.
narrative_role: The face of the league — celebrity fighter who weaponizes fame and social media presence
media_archetype_inspiration: Twitch streamer celebrity fighter (Lara Croft meets Pokimane)

concept_hook: A former death row inmate transformed into a living weapon through illegal gene-splicing, now hunting the corporation that made her.
narrative_role: The monster the league created — tragic figure seeking revenge against her makers
media_archetype_inspiration: Alita: Battle Angel meets Y: The Last Man

concept_hook: A cold, calculating assassin who kills with elegant precision and considers every fight a business transaction.
narrative_role: The professional — emotionless mercenary who sees the league as just another contract

concept_hook: A possessed woman inhabited by a demon who bargains for souls through deadly games of chance she always wins.
narrative_role: The gambler — offers doomed bargains, plays with souls, genuinely enjoys her dark work
media_archetype_inspiration: Deal with the Devil archetype (Labyrinth's Jareth meets Carmilla)

concept_hook: A free-spirited nature spirit bound to a human form who fights with wild, unpredictable animalistic grace.
narrative_role: The wild card — innocent but dangerous, doesn't fully understand human cruelty
media_archetype_inspiration: Nature spirit fighter (Megan Fox in TMNT meets Poison Ivy)

concept_hook: A disgraced MMA champion rebuilt with experimental combat drugs who fights while slowly poisoning herself.
narrative_role: The desperate veteran — once great, now clinging to glory through dangerous enhancement

concept_hook: A surgically-altered illusionist who uses mirrors, lights, and psychological manipulation to make opponents fight ghosts of themselves.
narrative_role: The trickster — fights dirty with misdirection, genuinely loves humiliating opponents

concept_hook: A former child prodigy violinist turned electromagnetic warfare specialist who fights with sound frequencies that shatter minds.
narrative_role: The genius — calculates every fight like a symphony, devastated when outplayed
media_archetype_inspiration: Musical weapon (Jean Grey meets Violet Baudelaire)
